scripts.build: pnpm --filter @thaloslab/shared build && pnpm --filter @thaloslab/web build && pnpm --filter @thaloslab/daemon build && pnpm --filter @thaloslab/cli build
scripts.gate: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @thaloslab/shared build && concurrently -k -n shared,daemon,web "pnpm --filter @thaloslab/shared build:watch" "pnpm --filter @thaloslab/daemon dev" "pnpm --filter @thaloslab/web dev"
